---
title: 'Baroclinic anomalies associated with the Southern Hemisphere Annular Mode:
  Roles of synoptic and low-frequency eddies'
pagetitle: 2013-5-1-Nie2013 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2013
author: Yu Nie, Yang Zhang, Xiu-Qun Yang and Gang Chen
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 2361--2366, doi:10.1002/grl.50396.
recommended_citation: 'Yu Nie, Yang Zhang, Xiu-Qun Yang and Gang Chen, 2013: Baroclinic
  anomalies associated with the Southern Hemisphere Annular Mode: Roles of synoptic
  and low-frequency eddies, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 2361--2366, doi:10.1002/grl.50396.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/grl.50396
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Baroclinic anomalies associated with the Southern Hemisphere Annular Mode: Roles of synoptic and low-frequency eddies

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2013*

**Recommended citation:** Yu Nie, Yang Zhang, Xiu-Qun Yang and Gang Chen, 2013: Baroclinic anomalies associated with the Southern Hemisphere Annular Mode: Roles of synoptic and low-frequency eddies, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 2361--2366, doi:10.1002/grl.50396.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/grl.50396){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
